mediaconnect.bridgesource.CfnAbout: Adds sources to an existing bridge.

mediaconnect.bridgesource.BridgeArn.Description: The ARN of the bridge that you want to describe.

mediaconnect.bridgesource.FlowSource.Description: Add a flow source to an existing bridge.

mediaconnect.bridgesource.Name.Description: The name of the network source. This name is used to reference the source and must be unique among sources in this bridge.

mediaconnect.bridgesource.NetworkSource.Description: Add a network source to an existing bridge.
